landing.heroTitle: Find contractors. Post jobs. Get offers.
landing.heroText: Materiaalitukku connects people who need work done with local contractors and businesses in Estonia and Finland.
landing.step1Text: Describe what you need, where and when. It takes two minutes.
landing.step2Text: Local contractors see your tender and get in touch.
landing.step3Text: Compare offers and pick the one that suits you.
landing.bizText: List your business in the directory and reach new customers.

auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
